/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/Bird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/Pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/HighScore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/ConfigLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/PlayState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/GameOverState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FlappyBirdClone.dir/StateFactory.cpp.o -o /home/hashim/trading/build/FlappyBirdClone  -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -lsfml-audio
